- **SolidWorks**: 20xx SP x.x
- **Millwright**: v0.x.x

## 描述 / Description

简要描述问题。A clear description of the bug.

## 复现步骤 / Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## 期望行为 / Expected Behavior

描述你期望的结果。What you expected to happen.

## 实际行为 / Actual Behavior

描述实际发生了什么。What actually happened.

## 日志 / Logs

```
如有错误日志请粘贴在此 / Paste error logs here
```

## 截图 / Screenshots
